title: Persona MCP Server
description: An MCP server that stores personal context for AI interactions—profile, interests, knowledge, preferences. Inspired by my dissertation on context-aware AI tools for small business owners using design science methodology.

title: just so i know
description: Substack about life as an international student. Mostly therapy disguised as content.

title: CBC Hackathon
description: Led the first Claude Builder Club Hackathon at Northumbria. 90%+ retention.

title: Solterra
description: Full-stack healthcare event management app for Malaysian B40 communities, focused on cancer screening events. I handled as project lead for analysis, project management, quality assurance, and overall project coordination.

title: Gateshead by Bike
description: Social platform for cyclists. Database modelling, role-based permissions, accessibility focus.

title: Events Great North
description: Events booking site with server-side rendering and data sanitisation.

title: Capture Booth
description: Photo booth app to learn Svelte. Auth flow, canvas manipulation, state management.

title: Portfolio Site
description: Personal portfolio built with Next.js and JSON-based content management, and a local editor because I got tired of manually editing JSON files. Static export for GitHub Pages.
